_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: ReactJS
author: dapaupau@sigaul.com
description: Pro-tier ReactJS egg by YuraCloud. Optimized for performance, auto-updates, and support for npm, pnpm, yarn, and bun.
startup: print_status() { echo -e "\n\e[1;36m[YuraCloud]\e[0m \e[33m$1...\e[0m"; }; export PORT=${SERVER_PORT}; export PATH="/home/container/.local/bin:/home/container/.bun/bin:$PATH"; npm config set prefix /home/container/.local --global 2>/dev/null || npm config set prefix /home/container/.local; npm config set cache /home/container/.npm-cache --global 2>/dev/null || npm config set cache /home/container/.npm-cache; pnpm config set store-dir /home/container/.pnpm-store 2>/dev/null; yarn config set cache-folder /home/container/.yarn-cache 2>/dev/null; if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ] && ! command -v pnpm &> /dev/null; then print_status "Menginstal pnpm secara lokal"; npm install -g pnpm --loglevel=error; fi; if [ -f yarn.lock ] && ! command -v yarn &> /dev/null; then print_status "Menginstal yarn secara lokal"; npm install -g yarn --loglevel=error; fi; if [ -f bun.lockb ] && ! command -v bun &> /dev/null; then print_status "Menginstal bun secara lokal"; curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash; fi; if [ -d .git ] && [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" = "1" ]; then print_status "Menarik pembaruan kode dari GitHub"; git pull; fi; if [ -f package.json ]; then if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then print_status "Menginstal dependensi menggunakan pnpm"; pnpm install; elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then print_status "Menginstal dependensi menggunakan yarn"; yarn install; elif [ -f bun.lockb ]; then print_status "Menginstal dependensi menggunakan bun"; bun install; else print_status "Menginstal dependensi menggunakan npm"; npm install; fi; fi; print_status "Menjalankan aplikasi"; exec ${CMD_RUN}

installation.script:
#!/bin/sh
apk add --no-cache curl git nodejs npm
cd /mnt/server

if [ ! -f package.json ]; then
    echo "Creating default React + Vite project..."
    rm -rf * .[!.]*
    npx --yes create-vite@latest . --template react
fi

# --- Auto-detect Region ---
DETECTED_REGION=$(curl -s http://ip-api.com/line?fields=country | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$DETECTED_REGION" ]; then DETECTED_REGION="Unknown"; fi

# --- Branding and Information ---
echo ""
echo "=================================================="
echo "                  YuraCloud                       "
echo "=================================================="
echo "Informasi Server:"
echo "UUID      : ${P_SERVER_UUID}"
echo "Region    : ${DETECTED_REGION}"
echo "Port      : ${SERVER_PORT}"
echo "Egg Type  : ReactJS (Vite)"
echo "=================================================="
echo "    Terima kasih sudah membeli di YuraCloud!      "
echo "=================================================="
echo ""

variables.name: Command Run
variables.description: The command that will be executed to start your React application (supports npm, pnpm, yarn, bun).

variables.name: Node Version
variables.description: Select the Node.js version to display (Note: Depends on Docker image tag).

variables.name: Auto Deploy
variables.description: Otomatis melakukan deploy/pull kode terbaru dari GitHub setiap kali server di-restart (seperti konsep Railway).
